text: Why did the FireGlass team choose a hybrid MQTT-backend plus WebSocket-frontend architecture instead of letting the dashboard connect directly to the MQTT broker?
What objections did Clara raise to the WebSocket layer, and on what grounds did Samir overrule connecting the browser directly to MQTT?
What did the internal team tell each other about the project timeline pressure versus what they told the client Alberto about a possible slip?
Is the Helion HelionLink v2.3 firmware and protocol documentation actually available, or is the integration proceeding on reverse-engineered guesses?
What sensor payload fields did John reverse-engineer from the TG-400 demo unit, and which parts of the protocol remained unknown?
What connectivity problem did field testing in Milan reveal on Unit C, and what was hypothesized as the root cause?
How was the Milan field testing described to the client versus what the internal field notes actually reported?
Why does the device_battery_pct field always read 100%, and is that a bug or expected behavior?
Does offline mode work for sensor readings, or only for inspection forms?
How did the launch scope priorities change when Alberto demanded the compliance reporting module be front-loaded for the Argus Safety Group audit?
Which feature won the trade-off between CSV export and the notification system, and why?
What is the FG-001 duplicate-sensor-readings bug, what is its root cause, and what is the temporary workaround?
How does the system fail to distinguish an offline sensor from a legitimate zero-temperature reading, and why is that a go-live blocker?
Why can't field technician John Smith view sensor readings from installations he personally commissioned?
What production MQTT broker decision is still unresolved, and what must happen before it can be made?
Did Alberto's expectation of sub-second real-time alerts survive into the launch scope, or was it descoped?
Why was the MQTT topic namespace 'fire-glass/' questioned, and was the decision to keep or change it resolved?
Which features were deferred to Phase 2 in the timeline-recovery plan, and which stayed in the MVP?
What did the pre-launch checklist mark as done, in progress, and blocked one week before UAT?
What does ASG-FP Level 2 compliance require of the PDF reports, and why is it commercially critical for Innovative Windows?
